# Left PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 131.103 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 3.3696
  biquad b0=1.00044148148 b1=-1.99778612928 b2=0.997418197034 a1=-1.99778612928 a2=0.997859678518

  biquad b0=1.00201560102 b1=-1.99000425494 b2=0.988212677388 a1=-1.99000425494 a2=0.990228278404

  biquad b0=1.01363976707 b1=-1.92171476194 b2=0.920234047556 a1=-1.92171476194 a2=0.93387381463

  biquad b0=1.00127921148 b1=-1.99302303588 b2=0.992172246957 a1=-1.99302303588 a2=0.993451458434
